question_text: What is the amplitude of a wave?

options.label: A
options.text: The maximum distance the wave travels from its starting point

options.label: B
options.text: The maximum displacement of a particle from its rest position

options.label: C
options.text: The distance between two consecutive wave crests

options.label: D
options.text: The number of complete waves passing a point per second

explanation: Amplitude is how far a particle moves up or down from its resting position when a wave passes through it. It measures the size or strength of the wave. The other options describe wavelength or frequency instead.
